title: Thermax and HPCL Partner on Bio-Based Fuels, Electrolysers and CO2 Capture at India Energy Week 2026
content: Thermax Limited and Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited have signed a Memorandum of Understanding at India Energy Week 2026 in Goa to strengthen collaboration on sustainable energy solutions. The strategic partnership focuses on exchanging scientific information, undertaking joint research, and supporting demonstration and deployment across high pressure AEM electrolysers, CO2 capture solutions, bio pyrolysis oil processing, and other emerging new energy areas. By combining Thermaxâ€™s technology and product expertise with HPCLâ€™s research capabilities, operational excellence, and scale, the collaboration aims to accelerate indigenous clean energy innovation. The partnership is aligned with Indiaâ€™s energy transition and climate objectives and supports the Make in India vision by advancing homegrown technologies. Both companies highlighted that strong industry partnerships are critical to moving innovations from research to large scale implementation, particularly in areas such as green hydrogen, carbon capture, and bio based fuels, enabling faster progress toward sustainable and resilient energy systems in India.
author: Analysts Account
